table.noDataDescription: Create a new schedule to get started.
table.selectCompany: Select a company in the top menu to view schedules.

delete.title: Confirm deletion
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this schedule?

success.title: Schedule deleted successfully
success.description: The schedule has been deleted correctly

error.title: Error
error.description: Error deleting the schedule. Please try again.

welcome.title: Welcome to the Schedules module
welcome.description: In this module you can manage system schedules. This guide will show you the main features available.

tabs.title: Active and inactive
tabs.description: Switch between active and inactive schedules to view and manage each group separately.

filters.title: Search filters
filters.description: Filter by code, name, meal break and creation date. Use Search to apply filters.

toolbar.title: Main actions
toolbar.description: Add new schedule or download the list in Excel format.

table.title: Schedules table
table.description: Preview, edit, activate/deactivate and delete each schedule. Columns show code, name, hours and meal break.

pagination.title: Pagination
pagination.description: Use these controls to navigate between pages and adjust the number of records displayed.

welcome.title: Schedule form
welcome.description: In this form you can create or edit a schedule. Configure basic information, duration and breaks or meal breaks.

basicInfo.title: Basic information
basicInfo.description: The name is generated automatically based on configuration. Enter the code and activate or deactivate the schedule (edit only).

scheduleConfig.title: Schedule configuration
scheduleConfig.description: Start time, duration in hours and minutes, discount minutes and automatically calculated end time.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.description: Visual view of the schedule and breaks per day. Updates automatically according to configuration.

breaks.title: Breaks and meal breaks
breaks.description: Add meal breaks or breaks. Configure day, start and end time, and whether the time is deductible from work.

breaks.title: Breaks and Meal Breaks
breaks.noBreaks: No breaks or meal breaks configured

basicInfo.title: Basic Information
basicInfo.name: Name (Auto-generated)
basicInfo.nameDescription: The name is automatically generated according to the configuration
basicInfo.companiesRequired: You must select at least one company

scheduleConfig.title: Schedule Configuration
scheduleConfig.discountMinutesRequired: Please enter the meal break minutes to discount
scheduleConfig.discountMinutesDescription: Meal break time not counted as work
scheduleConfig.calculatedEndTimeDescription: Automatically calculated according to entered values

breaks.title: Breaks and Meal Breaks
breaks.noBreaksDescription: Add breaks or meal breaks to get started

validation.cannotEndNextDay: Break cannot end the next day on the last day
validation.startsBeforeSchedule: Break starts before the day's schedule
validation.endsAfterSchedule: Break ends after the day's schedule
validation.hasErrorsDescription: There are breaks with errors. Please fix them before continuing.

createSuccess.title: Schedule created successfully
createSuccess.description: The schedule has been created correctly

updateSuccess.title: Schedule updated successfully
updateSuccess.description: The schedule has been updated correctly

createError.title: Error creating schedule
createError.description: An error occurred while creating the schedule

updateError.title: Error updating schedule
updateError.description: An error occurred while updating the schedule
